texto: True rebels hate their own rebellion. They know by experience that it is not a cool and glamorous lifestyle
autor: it takes a courageous fool to say things that have not been said and to do things that have not been done.
explicacao: Citação de it takes a courageous fool to say things that have not been said and to do things that have not been done. sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “True rebels hate their own rebellion. They know by experience that it is not a cool and glamorous…” articula reflexao, criss-jami, venus-in-arms em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como venus-in-arms.
